# Unshakeable Faith
## Scripture
"Though he slay me, I will hope in him." – Job 13:15
## Reflection
As men, we often face uncertainty and adversity in life. We may feel like giving up or losing our grip on faith when things get tough. But today's verse reminds us that our hope should not be shaken, even in the midst of trials. Job could have easily lost his faith when God allowed him to suffer, but instead, he chose to hold on to hope. He knew that God was still good, even when things seemed chaotic. In the same way, we can choose to trust God, even when we don't understand what's happening. We can rest in the promise that He is always working, even when we can't see it.

As men, we need to cultivate an unshakeable faith that will carry us through the tough times. This means trusting God even when things don't go as planned, even when we face failure or rejection. It means having a rock-solid confidence in God's goodness and sovereignty.

## Daily Challenge
Do 50 jumping jacks while declaring out loud, "I trust in God's goodness, no matter what!"
